generated_oml:
instance CraneStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor capturing crane state data from physical gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneStateDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CraneStateSensor
]

instance CraneStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Continuous crane state data logged from physical crane"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBLoggingEnabler, RealTimeVisualizationEnabler, ContinuousValidationEnabler, OptimalControlEnabler
]

instance TimescaleDBLoggingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB time-series database for logging crane state data"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for logging historical crane data to support performance analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalPerformanceAnalysisInsight
]

instance HistoricalPerformanceAnalysisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight derived from historical data for crane performance analysis"
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for real-time data visualization of crane operations"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataVisualizationService
]

instance RealTimeDataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for real-time visualization of crane system status for monitoring purposes"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of crane operations for system monitoring"
]

instance ContinuousValidationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for continuous validation of digital twin against physical system"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service to continuously validate digital twin model against physical system behavior for accuracy assurance"
    DTDFVocab:provides ContinuousValidationInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight from continuous validation of digital twin accuracy"
]

instance OptimalControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for optimal control of crane operations"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService
]

instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for optimizing crane operations based on real-time data"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalControlAction
]

instance OptimalControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic control actions to optimize crane operations"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance C4Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "C4 model for architecture visualization of gantry crane system"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo C4VisualizationEnabler
]

instance C4VisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for C4 model architecture visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables ArchitectureVisualizationService
]

instance ArchitectureVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for visualizing system architecture using C4 model"
    DTDFVocab:provides ArchitectureVisualizationInsight
]

instance ArchitectureVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of gantry crane system architecture using C4 model"
]

instance LabEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Laboratory research environment for gantry crane system"
    base:contains PhysicalCraneComponent, ControllerComponent
]

instance PhysicalCraneComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical gantry crane structure and mechanical parts"
]

instance ControllerComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Controller component managing crane operations"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The Control Application (Python) uses the Physical Crane Interface to send control commands to the Physical Crane. Specific command types, message formats, validation and authentication mechanisms, feedback systems, conflict resolution, and command execution confirmation details are not provided in the document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system adopts an ad-hoc architectural approach utilizing containerization for deployment, with the C4 Model employed to visualize architecture via context and container diagrams."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Services communicate via an MQTT broker for signaling, as depicted in the container diagram. ]
